---
name: Task
about: A change, addition, or chore to do
title: ""
labels: ""
---

<!--
Title: intent-shaped — say what outcome you want. No `[bug]`/`M0:`/`P1` prefixes;
labels, milestones, and Project fields carry type, phase, and priority — don't
duplicate them in the title.
Assign a milestone (the phase gate this belongs to). For decomposition, use
parent/sub-issues, not a checklist in the body.
See `.github/gh-operations.md` for how to wire milestones, dependencies, and sub-issues.
-->

## What
<!-- the change to make -->

## Why
<!-- motivation / context -->

## Done when
<!-- acceptance criteria — the branch closes when these hold, and QA verifies them -->

## Scope
<!-- In: what this covers. Out: explicitly what NOT to touch (keep it branch-sized). -->

## Related
<!-- link related issues / PRs -->
